'Never start fresh while orphaned-claimed rows exist'. Two-class failure + retry-escalation (pass.rs:107-115; attempts from DURABLE count; auto-fail after max_retries=5; timeout->Transient).

question: H-engine-ref
claim: REFERENCE (D2-consume + DL-newInfoRatio-audit): dual-gate STOP/GO via Beta posterior (trust.rs:43-60; reliability_sweep.rs:83-117) — a decision needs count k(>=2) AND posterior>=threshold BOTH clearing; posterior asymptotes to mean reliability (anti-sybil: count alone can't buy confidence); reachability-reject unsatisfiable configs. For D2->STOP: weight iterations/reviewers by reliability, require min-count AND posterior-floor; never let raw vote-count alone trip STOP. Also the template to gate the self-graded newInfoRatio (count+belief, not raw consumption).
